titleStmt.title: SII 4.1327: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1327. (A.R. No. 405 of 1893). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śākābdēṁbudhivahnikhēṁdugaṇitē
saumyaśca vārē bhṛśaṁ . paṁcamyāṁ vilasatpradīpamanaghaḥ śrīsū¨ryyanāmā pra
bhuḥ prādādbhīma mahēśvarāya ruciraṁ tauhaṁ jagaddīpanaḥ [. 1*] seṭṭidēvīti vikhyātā gaṁḍa
cilkapriyāṁgganā . bhaktyā ca bhīmanāthāya dattā dīpaṁ samujvalaṁ [. 2*] śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1034
svasti . sa¨rvvalōkāśraya śrīpritvīvalabha mahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka ra
vikulatilaka cōḍakulaśēkhara pāṇḍyakulāṁtaka samastarājāśraya rājarājēṁdra vīra
maheṁdra vikramacōḍa vijayābharaṇa rājakēsariva¨rmma pe¨rmmanaḍigalu gaṁgākāvērīpa
¨ryyaṁta saptamōviṣṇuva¨rddhanulaina tribhuvanacakrava¨rtti śrīkulōttuṁgacōḍadēvara prava¨rddha
mānavijayarājyasaṁvatsa 43 gu śrahini . svasti . sakalajananutaparamavaṁsōbava bharadvāja
gōtra vriṣabhalāṁccana kaḍuvapaṟegōṣaṇa khaṭvāṁgakētana lalitā¨rddhacaṁdradhara kāṁccīpurēsvara naṁbi
kulatilaka yuddhatrinētra śrīmanmahāmaṇḍalēśvarulaina bīragoṭṭamuna sūraparaju dēvi sejjamaku ga
ṁggagoṇḍacōḍavalanāṁṭi guddavadināṁṭi peddaḍākarēmi śrībhīmēśvaramahādēvaraku riṣabhamāsamuna śuddhapakṣimuna pāḍya
yu budhavaramunaṇḍu veṭṭina yakhaṇḍava¨rttilōhapudiviya 1 ṇṭi dīnikiṁ beṭṭina modavulu 50 . dīniki nācaṁdra¨rkkamu neyu sariyiṁcuvārugā prōlabōla
yuṁ gāṭabhōla nāviyayu meṁṭana Eṟiyanayuṁ dalarasi nāviyayu berasina būṁṭagā prōlabhōla viya Aḍapuna
kommaya vasamunaṁ beṭṭina
Digital edition of SII 4.1327 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
